name: Coconut-Apricot Haystacks
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Jo Anne Merrill
Preparation Time: 0:15
1. Combine the sugar, margarine, milk, and cocoa powder in a saucepan.
2. Cook, stirring constantly, until the mixture boils.
3. Boil for 30 seconds; remove from heat.
4. Blend in the remaining ingredients using a wooden spoon to mix well.
5. Drop by spoonfuls onto waxed paper.
6. Cool completely.
7. Store with sheets of waxed paper between layers in an airtight container.
Yield: 40-50 "haystacks".
